Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Sep-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Geoffrey Dickhaut, Esq. LIMONJYAN LAW GROUP, APC (213) 277-7444 gdickhaut@lawgroupla.com
Attorneys for Plaintiff, MA NOREEN MENDOZA
JOHN H. ADAMS, JR., Esq., LITTLER MENDELSON, P.C. 916.830.7200 jhadams@littler.com Attorneys for Defendant HEBREW HOME FOR AGED DISABLED D/B/A JEWISH HOME

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HEBREW HOME FOR AGED DISABLED D/B/A JEWISH HOME's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

Defendant Hebrew Home for Aged Disabled D/B/A Jewish Home's motion to compel arbitration is granted. The proceedings are stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration.

(see word minutes for complete ruling)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings

Attorneys for Plaintiff MA NOREEN MENDOZA
JOHN H. ADAMS, JR., Esq., LITTLER MENDELSON, P.C.916.830.7200 jhadams@littler.com

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED. Court addresses plaintiff's late filed opposition.

The Court modifies and adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HEBREW HOME FOR AGED DISABLED D/B/A JEWISH HOME'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is continued to September 11, 2024 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 to allow for consideration of plaintiff's late filed opposition.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
